message:
Add .gitignore patterns for benchmark binaries

Prevent benchmark binaries from appearing in repo root:
- /fibonacci, /fibonacci_*
- /hello, /hello_*
- /*.rmeta
- benchmarks/{fibonacci,hello}_{go,rust}

These should only exist in benchmarks/ directory.

files.patch:
@@ -81,6 +81,17 @@ test_pool
 test_glob
 test_string_builder
 
+# Benchmark binaries (should only be in benchmarks/ dir)
+/fibonacci
+/fibonacci_*
+/hello
+/hello_*
+/*.rmeta
+benchmarks/fibonacci_go
+benchmarks/fibonacci_rust
+benchmarks/hello_go
+benchmarks/hello_rust
+
 # Debug/backup files
 repro_*.zig
 *_backup.zig
